summary: Complete e2e testing of AI Radio Station feature - all backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. Radio player, donation system, admin management, and analytics dashboard all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Radio.js line 116-120: ESLint warning - useEffect missing 'isPlaying' and 'currentTrack' dependencies. Consider adding eslint-disable comment or using useCallback.
AdminDashboard.js line 10-15: ESLint warning - useEffect missing 'checkForNewSales' dependency (same as previous iteration).

Missing data-testid attributes: Radio.js donation buttons ($5, $10, $25, Custom), player controls (play/pause, prev, next), AdminRadio.js form inputs and buttons. Recommend adding for better test automation.
Radio.js line 120: isPlaying dependency in useEffect could cause infinite loop if not handled carefully.
seed_data_creation: Test tracks and DJ announcements created via API tests (prefixed with TEST_), cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Radio system fully functional. OpenAI TTS integration working via emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Donation system uses Stripe with test key sk_test_emergent. Audio stored as base64 in MongoDB. Admin dashboard shows 4 revenue cards (Total, Content, Donations, Page Views). Test data: 1 track (349b3bb7-1a3d-41ec-9a00-d6f64bcc7934), multiple DJ announcements created during testing.

details: GET /api/radio/track/{track_id} - returns track details with audio data
POST /api/radio/track/upload - uploads audio file and stores in database
POST /api/radio/dj/announcement - generates AI voice using OpenAI TTS
Multiple voice options working (nova, onyx, etc.)
Donations stored in MongoDB with type='donation'
Recent transactions include donation type info
Page loads at /radio with header 'RJHNSN12 Radio'
Now Playing section shows current track
Player controls: play/pause, prev, next buttons
Track info displayed (Track X of Y)
Custom donation input appears on click
4 revenue cards: Total Revenue, Content Sales, Donations, Page Views
Recent Transactions table shows donations with '❤️ Donation' label
Upload Music Track form: title, artist, duration, file input
Generate AI DJ Announcement form: script textarea, voice selector
Current Playlist section shows tracks with delete buttons
DJ Announcements section shows announcements with play buttons
